_comment: spec-v50 §3.4: the only persistent-storage keys Sophie is permitted to write. Any localStorage.setItem(...) / sessionStorage.setItem(...) in the codebase must pass a string literal whose value is in `keys` below. The service worker's Cache Storage namespaces are listed in `cacheNamespacePrefixes`: actual cache names like `sophiewell-shell-${BUILD_HASH}` are matched by prefix. sw-remember / sw-saved-inputs back the spec-v61 §2 A7 opt-in input-persistence toggle (off by default; numeric/choice inputs only, never PHI free-text).
